faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Quick answers before you sign up.

items.question: What does Echo do?
items.answer: Echo collects user feedback in one place. AI analyzes it to detect trends, sentiment, and key themes. You just read the summaries and make decisions.

items.question: How does it integrate?
items.answer: Use our widget (one line of code), create dedicated feedback pages, or connect your product directly via API. Pick what works for you.

items.question: How good is the AI analysis?
items.answer: AI doesn't just summarize — it spots patterns you'd miss. Sentiment, recurring bugs, feature requests, all categorized and prioritized automatically.

items.question: When does it launch?
items.answer: We're about to launch the beta. Being on the list means you get in first.

items.question: How much does it cost?
items.answer: There's a free plan to get started. Premium plans unlock higher volume and advanced AI features.

seo.title: Echo — Feedback intelligence for digital products
seo.description: Collect, analyze, and act on user feedback. API, widget, and AI-powered dashboard. Join the waitlist.
seo.keywords: feedback, user feedback, feedback widget, feedback API, AI analytics, user insights, product feedback, echo
